warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
The Fukui reactivity indices for nitrobenzene were computed using the `fukui-reactivity` skill in chemkit.

**Fukui Reactivity Indices for Nitrobenzene** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (cation: charge 1, multiplicity 2; anion: charge -1, multiplicity 2). Geometry: built from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`. SCF converged.

The most electrophilic site (highest f+) is Carbon (index 3, atom 4) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.49642.
The most nucleophilic site (highest f-) is Carbon (index 4, atom 5) with a Fukui f- index of 0.10729.

**Fukui Indices per Atom (Mulliken charges from PySCF):**
| Atom Index | Symbol | Fukui f+ | Fukui f- | Fukui f0 | Dual Descriptor |
|:----------:|:------:|:--------:|:--------:|:--------:|:---------------:|
| 0          | O      | 0.47317  | 0.09702  | 0.28509  | 0.37616         |
| 1          | O      | 0.47344  | 0.09677  | 0.28511  | 0.37667         |
| 2          | N      | -0.45670 | 0.01724  | -0.21973 | -0.47394        |
| 3          | C      | 0.49642  | -0.01429 | 0.24106  | 0.51071         |
| 4          | C      | 0.11563  | 0.10729  | 0.11146  | 0.00834         |
| 5          | C      | 0.11588  | 0.10724  | 0.11156  | 0.00865         |
| 6          | C      | 0.17412  | 0.09492  | 0.13452  | 0.07920         |
| 7          | C      | 0.17423  | 0.09489  | 0.13456  | 0.07934         |
| 8          | C      | 0.28914  | 0.00831  | 0.14872  | 0.28082         |
| 9          | H      | -0.23169 | 0.07521  | -0.07824 | -0.30690        |
| 10         | H      | -0.23182 | 0.07520  | -0.07831 | -0.30702        |
| 11         | H      | -0.13372 | 0.08388  | -0.02492 | -0.21761        |
| 12         | H      | -0.13379 | 0.08388  | -0.02496 | -0.21768        |
| 13         | H      | -0.12431 | 0.07243  | -0.02594 | -0.19673        |

No significant warnings were reported; charge conservation checks for f+ and f- sums were both 1.0000, indicating good convergence for the N±1 states.
